messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0005",
  "title": "2025年全球手游市场营销趋势洞察",
  "page_index": 7,
  "page_range": "7"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0006",
    "title": "2025 OBSERVATION ON GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING 2025年全球手游市场营销趋势洞察01",
    "page_range": "7-8",
    "summary": "This parent section (pages 7–8, with detailed breakdowns spanning pages 8–15) delivers a comprehensive, data-driven analysis of 2025 global mobile game marketing trends, structured to support precise retrieval queries on market scale, creative adoption, genre performance, regional intensity, and platform allocation. \n\n**Topics & Entities:** Covers global mobile game advertising dynamics, new creative placement, genre/category marketing shifts, regional campaign intensity, and OS/format distribution. Key entities include the ad intelligence platform 广大大 (data source), major regions (Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, South America, HK/Macau/TW, Japan/Korea, Oceania, etc.), OS platforms (iOS, Android), ad channels (Facebook, X/Twitter, UnityAds), and game genres (RPG, Strategy, Casino/Entertainment, Casual, Puzzle, Simulation, Action, Arcade, Adventure, Card, Board, Text).\n\n**Dates:** Primary coverage spans January–December 2025, with year-over-year (YoY) comparisons to 2024 and three-year trend analysis (2023–2025).\n\n**Key Claims & Metrics:** \n- *Market Scale & Growth:* Monthly active advertisers average >84,000 (peaking >90,000 in June), reflecting 21.9% YoY growth. New advertisers average ~8,000/month (9.4% share), with an annual new advertiser share of 23.4%.\n- *Creative Adoption:* >82% of advertisers deploy new creatives monthly (avg 82.5%, +14.6% YoY). New creative share averages 58.1% (+5.9pp YoY), surpassing 60% in November and peaking at 63.2% in December.\n- *Genre Performance:* RPG leads in ad volume (avg 801 creatives/product annually), followed by Strategy (728). Casino/Entertainment shows the highest growth, with advertiser share at 47% (+22.7% YoY) and creative share at 22.3% (+13.9% YoY).\n- *Regional Intensity:* Europe is the only region exceeding 40,0..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0014",
    "title": "一线洞察",
    "page_range": "15",
    "summary": "This section can answer questions about which entities are associated with the \"一线洞察\" (Frontline Insights) topic. It explicitly lists four entities: 益世界, NEOCRAFT, 英雄游戏, and 游艺春秋. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Its retrieval value is strictly limited to entity identification and topic association."
  }
]

message.content:
This parent section (pages 7–15) provides a comprehensive, data-driven analysis of 2025 global mobile game marketing trends, structured to support precise retrieval on market scale, creative adoption, genre performance, regional intensity, and platform allocation.

**Topics:** Global mobile game advertising dynamics, new creative placement, genre/category marketing shifts, regional campaign intensity, OS/format distribution, and frontline industry insights (一线洞察).
**Entities:** Data source: 广大大 (ad intelligence platform). Regions: Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, South America, HK/Macau/TW, Japan/Korea, Oceania. Platforms/Channels: iOS, Android, Facebook, X/Twitter, UnityAds. Game Genres: RPG, Strategy, Casino/Entertainment, Casual, Puzzle, Simulation, Action, Arcade, Adventure, Card, Board, Text. Frontline companies: 益世界, NEOCRAFT, 英雄游戏, 游艺春秋.
**Dates:** January–December 2025, with year-over-year (YoY) comparisons to 2024 and a three-year trend analysis (2023–2025).
**Claims & Metrics:** Monthly active advertisers average >84,000 (peaking >90,000 in June), reflecting 21.9% YoY growth. New advertisers average ~8,000/month (9.4% monthly share, 23.4% annual share). Over 82% of advertisers deploy new creatives monthly (avg 82.5%, +14.6% YoY), with new creative share averaging 58.1% (+5.9pp YoY) and peaking at 63.2% in December. RPG leads in ad volume (avg 801 creatives/product annually), followed by Strategy (728). Casino/Entertainment shows the highest growth, with advertiser share at 47% (+22.7% YoY) and creative share at 22.3% (+13.9% YoY). Europe is identified as the only region exceeding 40% in a specific campaign intensity metric.
**Evidence Types:** Quantitative market data, trend analysis, and YoY growth metrics sourced from the 广大大 ad intelligence platform.
**Tables, Figures, Definitions, Procedures:** Not visible or detailed in the provided child summaries.

response_text:
This parent section (pages 7–15) provides a comprehensive, data-driven analysis of 2025 global mobile game marketing trends, structured to support precise retrieval on market scale, creative adoption, genre performance, regional intensity, and platform allocation.

**Topics:** Global mobile game advertising dynamics, new creative placement, genre/category marketing shifts, regional campaign intensity, OS/format distribution, and frontline industry insights (一线洞察).
**Entities:** Data source: 广大大 (ad intelligence platform). Regions: Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, South America, HK/Macau/TW, Japan/Korea, Oceania. Platforms/Channels: iOS, Android, Facebook, X/Twitter, UnityAds. Game Genres: RPG, Strategy, Casino/Entertainment, Casual, Puzzle, Simulation, Action, Arcade, Adventure, Card, Board, Text. Frontline companies: 益世界, NEOCRAFT, 英雄游戏, 游艺春秋.
**Dates:** January–December 2025, with year-over-year (YoY) comparisons to 2024 and a three-year trend analysis (2023–2025).
**Claims & Metrics:** Monthly active advertisers average >84,000 (peaking >90,000 in June), reflecting 21.9% YoY growth. New advertisers average ~8,000/month (9.4% monthly share, 23.4% annual share). Over 82% of advertisers deploy new creatives monthly (avg 82.5%, +14.6% YoY), with new creative share averaging 58.1% (+5.9pp YoY) and peaking at 63.2% in December. RPG leads in ad volume (avg 801 creatives/product annually), followed by Strategy (728). Casino/Entertainment shows the highest growth, with advertiser share at 47% (+22.7% YoY) and creative share at 22.3% (+13.9% YoY). Europe is identified as the only region exceeding 40% in a specific campaign intensity metric.
**Evidence Types:** Quantitative market data, trend analysis, and YoY growth metrics sourced from the 广大大 ad intelligence platform.
**Tables, Figures, Definitions, Procedures:** Not visible or detailed in the provided child summaries.
